news.title: US stocks slump after fresh sell-off in tech stocks; Nasdaq down over 1%
news.description: Wall Street's major indices declined as weakness in technology stocks and escalating US-Iran tensions overshadowed inflation data that met expectations. Investors reassessed AI-related valuations, while geopolitical risks and concerns over prolonged higher interest rates dampened overall market sent

news.title: Gold price crash may revive wedding demand as buying season nears
news.description: Gold and silver prices witnessed a sharp correction from recent highs, raising hopes of stronger jewellery demand. Industry experts expect wedding and festive purchases to improve after Adhik Maas ends, with lower prices encouraging buyers across urban and rural markets.

news.title: Ahead of Market: 10 things that will decide stock market action on Thursday
news.description: Indian equities lost momentum after a positive start, with Nifty closing lower and broader markets declining sharply. Investor caution ahead of US inflation data, profit booking and geopolitical concerns weighed on sentiment, while FMCG and private banking stocks offered some support.

news.title: Market Trading Guide: Akums Drugs among 4 stock recommendations for Thursday
news.description: Domestic equities ended lower amid global uncertainty and caution ahead of key US inflation data. Despite market weakness, analysts remain bullish on Akums Drugs and Aditya Birla Sun Life AMC after strong technical breakouts, rising volumes and improving momentum indicators.

news.title: Goldman Sachs buys CMR Green Technologies shares on listing day after strong debut
news.description: Goldman Sachs India Equity Portfolio bought shares worth Rs 49.82 crore in CMR Green Technologies on its listing day, which saw a 43% premium. Despite investor optimism, analysts advise caution and partial profit booking amid high valuations.

news.title: Zee Entertainment to raise $241 million for stategic initiatives
news.description: Zee Entertainment is all set to gather 23 billion rupees to fuel its ambitious business strategies, following a significant win in securing the broadcast rights for the 2026 FIFA World Cup in India.

news.title: Gold Prices Ease 0.25% to $4,352.50 as Equity Rally and Stronger Dollar Curb Safe-Haven Buying
news.description: Gold futures fell 0.25% to $4,352.50 per ounce as global stock markets rebounded and the US dollar strengthened, reducing demand for gold as a safe-haven asset despite ongoing economic uncertainties.

news.title: Kenya Retains Benchmark Interest Rate for Second Time
news.description: Kenya’s central bank left its benchmark interest rate unchanged for the second time in a row, as it monitors the impact of the ongoing conflict in Iran on the economy.
